code:
import io
import string

fn classify(_ n: Int) -> String
  if n <= 3
    "short"
  else if n <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
end

fn loop_read() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      if n == 0
        ()
      else
        println("#{line} -> #{classify(n)}")
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end

loop_read()
